title: The CustomTools JSON schema
description: CustomTools is a specification for defining MCP custom tools.

service.title: The target Service for CustomTools
service.description: Holds reference information about this Service custom tools relate.

name.title: The name of Service these custom tools relate to.
name.description: Human readable name of the target Service for custom tools.

version.title: The version of API these custom tools relate to.
version.description: Human readable version of the target Service for custom tools.

customTools.title: The Service custom tools.
customTools.description: The custom tools are defined with name as key.

customToolItem.title: One custom tool definition
customToolItem.description: One custom tool definition. It is either a declarative mapping to a target tool (tool + arguments) or a custom script logic (script + tools).

tool.title: The name of the target tool, e.g., 'user', 'createIssue', etc.

script.title: A custom JavaScript logic executed via QuickJS4J.
script.description: The script may call other tools through the 'rs' host API (rs.callTool, rs.callToolAsync, rs.awaitPromises) and must return a JSON object used as the tool result.

tools.title: The exhaustive list of tools the script is allowed to call.
tools.description: Used both as a security allow-list and to pre-check elicitation secrets before running the script. Required when 'script' is set.

tool.title: The name of the target tool to call.

service.title: The target service for cross-service calls, expressed as the readable couple '<service_name:service_version>'.
service.description: Omit for a tool of the same service. The service is resolved within the current organization.

description.title: Human readable long description of this custom tool.

input.description: A JSON Schema object defining the expected parameters for the tool.

arguments.title: The target tool arguments result. Actually a template reusing ${input} notation.
